{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Second obstacle
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The second obstacle is a brick wall that re-forms behind competitors.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
